The '''Disaster at Deepspace Besh''' occurred nine months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] .

==Background==
With the combined efforts of [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]] to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Jorin Sol]] to cripple the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] command ship, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] hoped to end the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in a single decisive battle.

==The battle==
[[File:BattleOfTingelDeepspaceBesh-EGTW.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The battle seen from the cockpit of a TIE fighter]]
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fleet dropped out of hyperspace right after Jorin Sol's attempted assassination of the commanders on board ''[[Rebel One]]'' and began firing on the Rebel fleet, destroying transports and smaller capital ships ''en masse''.

A regretful Jorin Sol, having regained his senses, managed to convince Rebel spymaster [[Tungo Li]] to order all Rebel ships to scatter into hyperspace rather than follow the now-revealed escape algorithms, which would only bring them to another Imperial fleet.

Contrary to Vader's expectations, the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] under [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] were able to hold off the Imperial fleet long enough for Sol to overcome his conditioning and program the damaged ''Rebel One'' to make a hyperspace jump. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] managed to convince Sunber to let him and Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] go, and the Rebel ships were able to escape through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and scatter throughout the galaxy. Much of the fleet was deemed lost, possibly for good. Despite the destruction of much of the Rebel fleet, their escape resulted in an overall strategic failure for the Empire as even though Vader's plan of defeating the Rebel Alliance in one fell swoop managed to destroy several major capital ships, and leading to the eventual loss of ''Rebel One'', the Alliance Fleet rebuilt with aid from allies such as the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and would eventually go on to defeat the Imperial Navy at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] over three years later in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the disaster at Deepspace Besh in grid square P-13,<ref name="TEA" /> in the [[Sepan sector/Legends|Sepan sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>
